calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Conveyance Of Real Property To Estate Surviving Spouse
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for Gillian Baze. Scott Raber for Rose Meltzer and Clifford Meltzer.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of this matter being a probate 850 petition or a breach of contract action, and whether the Probate Court has jurisdiction or whether it is a civil action. The Court finds that this matter should be determined by a civil action. The Petition for Conveyance of Real Property to Estate Surviving Spouse was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION Petition For Conveyance Of Real Property To Estate Surviving Spouse
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for Gillian Baze (Petitioner). Scott Raber for Cliff Meltzer and Rose Meltzer (Respondents).

Mr. Lowe stated that he has a declaration responding to the Probate Examiner's notes, and that it is not signed by his Client but that he will get it signed. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of whether this action is proper under Probate Code 850 and whether this Court (Probate Court) has jurisdiction under Probate Code section 800. The Petition for Conveyance of Real Property to Estate Surviving Spouse was continued to April 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a memorandum of points and authorities as to why this matter should remain in Probate Court. The memorandum on the issue of jurisdiction is due by March 25, 2014. Response is due by April 8, 2014. Reply is due by April 15, 2014.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
